message:
feat(runtime): Apply unified comparison everywhere - builtins/operators.zig

Updated `builtins/operators.zig` to delegate same-type comparisons to the unified comparison utility (comparison.zig), establishing it as THE ONE SOURCE OF TRUTH.

Changes:
- operatorEq/Lt/Le/Gt/Ge now delegate to comparison.equal/lessThan/lessThanOrEqual/greaterThan/greaterThanOrEqual for same-type comparisons
- Reduced from ~150 lines of duplicate comparison logic to ~60 lines
- Cross-type comparisons still convert to PyValue (e.g., int vs float)
- Added import of unified comparison utility

Architecture after this change:
1. operator.zig (Lib/) → comparison.zig (unified utility)
2. builtins/operators.zig → comparison.zig (same-type) + PyValue conversion (cross-type)
3. comparison.zig → comparison_ops.zig (fast paths)
4. comparison_ops.zig → PyValue methods (low-level implementation)

This eliminates duplicate comparison logic throughout the codebase and ensures all comparisons follow Python semantics consistently.
